entities.name: Vibe Debugger
entities.context: Analyst conducting the root cause analysis

entities.name: Title generator
entities.context: The system component responsible for generating titles

entities.name: AAR
entities.context: Refers to the After Action Review data used in the title generation process

entities.name: session state data
entities.context: The temporary data used during system operations for title generation

entities.name: System Work
entities.context: An entity identified in the title generation process

entities.name: Work
entities.context: An action identified in the title generation process

relationships.context: Vibe Debugger uses the Title generator for title generation
Title generator extracts information from AAR data
Title generator uses session state data for processing
Title generator identifies System Work as an entity
Title generator identifies Work as an action
